raw_consumer_statement: Someone stole my barclays credit card number and bought three flights on XXXX XXXX. I noticed when I received an email about the flight. The confirmation code on XXXX  was XXXX. The traveler name listed was XXXX XXXX. I called barclays to dispute and stop the card. I called XXXX XXXX and canceled the flight. The charged amount was {$930.00}
